REMOVED Eldense — was RELEGATED from Segunda at end of 2024-25 season (confirmed: relegated May 25, 2025)
ADDED SD Huesca — was MISSING from previous file, they are in Segunda this season
Deportivo position: Was listed as 2nd (68pts) — this was already J38 data, not J37. After J37, Deportivo was 3rd with 65pts
Almería position: Was listed as 3rd (67pts) — after J37, Almería was actually 2nd with 67pts. Deportivo overtook them in J38
Córdoba: Was 54pts (partial) — CONFIRMED 54pts after J37, then 57pts after J38 win at Castellón
Racing Santander: Was 69pts in J37 — now 72pts after J38 win (4-2 vs Huesca)

key_discrepancy_resolved.question: Was Deportivo 2nd or Almería 2nd?
key_discrepancy_resolved.answer: BOTH are correct at different matchdays. After J37: Almería 2nd (67pts), Deportivo 3rd (65pts). After J38: Deportivo 2nd (68pts), Almería 3rd (67pts, pending match vs Mirandés). If Almería wins Monday match, they go to 70pts and reclaim 2nd.

remaining_gaps: W/D/L and GF/GA not fully verified for teams 15-22. These are non-critical fields. All points verified.

mbappe_injury_update.status: HIGHLY DOUBTFUL for El Clásico (May 10, J35 LaLiga)
mbappe_injury_update.injury: Semitendinosus muscle injury in left leg, sustained during Madrid 1-1 draw vs Real Betis
mbappe_injury_update.timeline: Expected return mid-May. Key medical test scheduled Wednesday May 6.
mbappe_injury_update.context: Mbappé was on vacation, returns to Valdebebas in 24-48h for further medical tests. World Cup (June 11) is also a concern for France.
mbappe_injury_update.verdict: Multiple sources say RULED OUT. One source (beIN Sports May 4) says decision on Wednesday. Most likely MISSES El Clásico.
